name: Chef Bacon
author: Poki
description: Chef Bacon is a fun cooking and management game where you run a charming farm market from the ground up! Start by picking fresh apples, serve happy customers, unlock new foods and tasty recipes, and hire assistants to keep things running smoothly. Upgrade your skills, grow your business, and earn more coins as your market expands. Ready to cook, farm, and become a market master? How to play Chef Bacon? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Chef Bacon? Chef Bacon is created by SnoutUp. Play their other games on Poki: Iron Snout , Bacon May Die , Card Hog , Hop Chop , Cave Blast , shurican, Toaster Dash , Card Hog , Bacon Survivor , and Bunny Goes Boom ! How can I play Chef Bacon for free? You can play Chef Bacon for free on Poki. Can I play Chef Bacon on mobile devices and desktop? Chef Bacon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
